fault_hypothesis: The conditional on line 69 incorrectly identifies cases where a value should be removed, causing the `pop()` on line 70 to erroneously delete an element when both input streams end with the same value.

constraints.intent: The final merged list must contain the sum of elements from both input lists.
The length invariant must hold even if the special-case branch for duplicate tails is taken.
The length invariant must hold when the special-case branch for duplicate tails is not taken.
